name: ChatVLSC Entra App Registration Write Status

attempted_change.transport: Zapier Microsoft Entra ID raw mutating request
attempted_change.intent: Preserve existing app registration collections while adding ChatVLSC description, homepage, redirect URIs, app roles, extra delegated consent scopes, and tags.

result.error_message: Insufficient privileges to complete the operation.

required_next_step.permission: Application.ReadWrite.All or equivalent Application Administrator / Cloud Application Administrator rights for the connected Microsoft Entra identity
required_next_step.logo_note: App logo upload still requires Microsoft Graph binary PUT /applications/{id}/logo using public/assets/chatvlsc-logo-512.png.
